name: Soulforge Aptitude
descriptionTemplate:
This talent is only effective in the {Astral Reign} level.
The Awakeners' CON, Attack, and DEF +[Arg1]%, and they gain [Arg2] Keyflare upon their first {Rouse}.
When Tawil plays a card originally belonging to other Awakeners in the team, the corresponding Awakeners' Final DMG, Shield, and HP Recovery in this turn +[Arg3]%, and this effect does not stack.
